trivia_bullets.text: Brazen Freebooter originated in Rivals of Ixalan (RIX, 2018), the conclusion of the Ixalan block, a pirate-and-dinosaur plane centered on warring factions competing to control the golden city of Orazca. CMR is its second reprint (also Jumpstart 2022). [Scryfall]

A 3/3 for four mana that enters with a Treasure token is slightly above-rate for its cost when the Treasure is factored in as one-mana ramp. Scryfall's all_parts field lists the Treasure token as a related combo_piece. It is Pauper-legal and sees play in ramp-heavy or Treasure-synergy Pauper and casual formats. Legal in Pauper, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander. [Scryfall]
Flavor text: "Finders, keepers." No speaker attributed. Two words that function as both the pirate's ethos and a Treasure rules shorthand. [Scryfall]

related_cards.name: Sailor of Means
related_cards.note: One-mana-cheaper Treasure-maker in the same pirate block

related_cards.name: Goldspan Dragon
related_cards.note: Flagship Treasure-doubler; Brazen Freebooter feeds the same archetype at common
